title: EVA 01 Wings Of Light at EoE
display_title: EVA 01 Wings Of Light at EoE
wikitext:
[]: EVA-01 Wings Of Light at EoE             Quote Post by DestinyWingsOfLight » Mon Dec 07, 2020 11:18 pm I'm still wondering what's up with Unit-01 Wings Of Light at EoE when Unit-01 breaks out of GNR's eye. Is it a sign of the ATF return to the world? since the 3I is pretty much everyone ATFs gone and united to one being.

[]: Re: EVA-01 Wings Of Light at EoE             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Wed Dec 09, 2020 12:47 am Our previous discussions put down Wings of Light as symbolic of power levels. When Eva-01 gets 12 wings after breaking out of GNR's eye, it's symbolic of having achieved the same power level as GNR (who also grows 12 wings) and it's a reference to the 12-winged angel Sammael in Judeo-Christian lore. From what I remember, Sammael's name means "The Poison of God", and is the angel of death and the most powerful of angels, with Sammael's mythology being later merged with that of Lucifer and Satan. We even get a good look at an artistic representation of Sammael right at the beginning of Cruel Angel's Thesis!
